businessBackground: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. is a single-segment manufacturer of **specialty piping systems and leak detection systems**. Products include: (i) insulated/jacketed district heating and cooling piping, (ii) primary/secondary containment piping for chemicals and hazardous fluids, (iii) coating and insulation of oil & gas gathering and transmission pipelines, and (iv) liquid and powder anti-corrosion coatings for steel pipe.
